sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41122" key="e)pisu/mforos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισύμ-φορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n41122.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contributing their influence,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(1).180.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
